hooks.command: PROJ=/home/lapromocion/proyecto-conjunto; LOG="$PROJ/obsidian_brain/02_Buzon_IA/session_log.md"; LAST=$(grep -o '<date>[^<]*</date>' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g'); TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); DAYS=$(( ( $(date -d "$TODAY" +%s) - $(date -d "${LAST:-1970-01-01}" +%s) ) / 86400 )); CHANGED=$(git -C "$PROJ" diff --name-only HEAD~1 2>/dev/null | head -20 | tr '\n' ' '); if [ "${DAYS:-999}" -gt 7 ] || [ -z "$LAST" ]; then MODE="FULL_REREAD"; else MODE="DELTA"; fi; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[DELTA_PROTOCOL] last_session=%s days_ago=%s mode=%s changed_files: %s"}}\n' "$LAST" "$DAYS" "$MODE" "$CHANGED"
